name: Mapo
text:
Recipe ID: Mapo_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Mapo

Ingredients:
- 13.5 kg Diced Onion
- 180 g Sichuan Pepper
- 1350 g Oil
- 216 g Ginger Diced
- 432 g Garlic Diced
- 2625 g Doubanjiang
- 15 l Kombu Stock
- 2100 ml Light Soy
- 450 ml Rock Sugar
- 1050 ml Shaohsing Wine

Steps:
1. Infuse Sichuan pepper corns into the oil disgarding the peppercorns after.
2. Caremelise the onions in the brat pan with the oil.
3. When brown add garlic and ginger until cooked.
4. Add the rest of the ingredients and bring to boil.
5. Cook the Mapo down slowly until the right consistency.
6. Chill the mix down completely.
7. Blend in the thermo at speed 5 for 4 seconds each batch.

Other details:
notes: Some dark soy may need to be added for the right colour

name: Caldo de Carabinero
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2113_parsed
Name: Caldo de Carabinero

Ingredients:
- 500 g cabezas carabineros
- 150 g aceite de oliva

Steps:
1. Separar las cabezas y los cuerpos de los carabineros. Reservar cuerpos (esta receta solo necesitara las cabezas).
2. Calentar la basculante a unos 130 grados, y echar un poquito de aceite de oliva.
3. Anadir 15 cabezas y dorar por cada lado un minuto.
4. Sacar el aceite (y rascar el aceite viejo) - es muy importante que cambiemos el aceite.
5. Poner las cabezas en un gastro cubierto con film.
6. Dejar reposar las cabezas en el aceite y tapar para concentrar el calor 20 minutos.
7. Machacar en un mortero hasta hacer una pasta.
8. Primero pasar por un colador normal y luego pasar por un colador.
9. Envasar en bolsas de 100 ml.

Other details:

name: Taiwanese Beef Noodles Soup… Version 1.0
text:
Recipe ID: Taiwanese Beef Noodles Soup v.1_parsed
Name: Taiwanese Beef Noodles Soup… Version 1.0

Ingredients:
- 1kg Beef; Grilled on Josper
- 100g Oil
- 100g Spring onion, Rough Cut
- 50g Ginger; rough cut
- 100g Onion; rough cut
- 75g Garlic; Bruised
- 100g Tomato Paste
- 30g Rock Sugar
- 125g Shaoxing Wine
- 3kg Roasted Bones
- 6kg Water
- 60g Cassia Cinnamon Stick (See Woo Brand/Chinese Cinnamon)
- 4pc Bay Leaves
- 20g Red Sichuan peppercorn Whole
- 10g Black Peppercorn Whole
- 10g Cumin Seeds
- 5g 5 Spice Powder
- 10g Coriander Seeds Whole
- 5pc Star Anise
- 125g Superior Light Soy Sauce
- 2 pc Carrot; Peeled & Rough Cut

Steps:
1. Saute everything until fragrant then add Shaoxing wine.
2. Combine seasoning with Beef in Vacuum Bags and cook at 82C for 10 Hrs (Overnight).
3. Bring broth ingredients to a boil and simmer.
4. Skim and reduce down to 1/3 of its volume.

name: Corn Tostada
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3771_parsed
Name: Corn Tostada

Ingredients:
- 200g fondant
- 100g isomalt
- 100g liquid glucose
- 1 bunch coriander
- 500g lactose powder
- Freeze-dried spring onion
- Tabasco chili powder
- 1% salt solution
- 5 limes

Steps:
1. Mix all the ingredients in a pan and cook to 161C.
2. Pour out onto silpat and allow to cool.
3. Once cool blend into a powder and store in airtight container.
4. Very important that the caramel is not left out too long as it is very sensitive to moisture.
5. Sieve the lactose powder over the base of a tray.
6. Pick the coriander leaves to get the nicest leaves.
7. Dry leaves overnight and brush off excess powder carefully.
8. Store in airtight container.
9. Take freeze-dried spring onion and Tabasco chili powder.
10. Measure and blend together.
11. Using a sharp knife peel limes and remove the segments.
12. Cook lime at room temperature in the salt solution for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
13. Strain and rinse well.
14. Dehydrate for 2-4 hours at 50 degrees until they are crispy. Important that the tostada doesn't become soggy.
15. Keep in airtight container.

Other details:

name: Peanut Powder
text:
Recipe ID: Peanut Powder_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Peanut Powder

Ingredients:
- 4 kg Blanched peanuts
- 800 g Caster sugar

Steps:
1. Preheat oven to 175°C (Rational 0 moisture).
2. In two 1/1 shallow gastro, roast peanuts for 15 minutes, turning every 5 minutes (in Rational) 2KG peanut in a shallow 1/1 gastro.
3. Cool peanuts.
4. When cooled, using the Thermomix lid cup, add 3 cups of roasted peanuts to the Thermomix (should be below the blade).
5. Blitz at Speed 8 for 6 seconds.
6. Using a spatula, make sure to get all peanuts.
7. After blitzed, add sieved sugar.
8. Mix thoroughly to make sure mixture is uniform.
9. Keep in refrigerator at all time.

Other details:
notes: ['BE CAREFUL when blitzing, risk of turning into peanut butter.', 'Might needs to be blanched again.', '***In Convotherm, might need to roast a further 5 minutes.']

name: Passion Fruit Puree and Mousse
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3790_parsed
Name: Passion Fruit Puree and Mousse

Ingredients:
- 100 g passion fruit puree
- 100 g sugar

Steps:
1. Mix the puree and the sugar.
2. Bring to the boil whisking constantly.
3. Allow to cool and then blend into a puree.
4. Store in a piping bag.
5. Return to heat and cook until sugar is completely caramelized.
6. Remove from the heat and spread out over a non-stick mat.
7. Allow to cool.
8. Store in a tight container.
9. Serve with a rosette of the mousse on the centre of the plate.
10. Spoon the meringue over the mousse with the spoon and fill with the passion fruit puree.
11. Place under a hot grill and burn the top of the meringue.

Other details:

name: Taiwanese 16 Spice Black Pork Ribs
text:
Recipe ID: Taiwanese 16 Spice Black Pork Ribs_Introduction_0_parsed
Name: Taiwanese 16 Spice Black Pork Ribs

Ingredients:
- 5 ribs of pork, cut in 2 inches max
- Cornflour
- Sweet potato flour
- 16 Spice Blend mix
- Basil leaves
- Dried Chilies

Steps:
1. Marinate the pork ribs.
2. Coat the ribs in cornflour and sweet potato flour.
3. Prefry the ribs at 160C for 6 minutes.
4. Cool the ribs.
5. Refry the ribs at 180C to warm them up.
6. Toss the ribs in 16 Spice Blend mix.
7. Serve with basil leaves and on a bed of dried chilies.

Other details:
allergens: Mustard, Egg, Soy
notes: Ideally, the presentation should be on a bed of round dried chilies, but See Woo ran out of stock, so maybe we should use chopped red chilies.

name: Consomme
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3810_parsed
Name: Consomme

Ingredients:
- 900g ceps
- 200g dried shiitake
- 200g brunoise onion
- 20g brunoise kombu
- 4l water
- 5g hay
- 5g red rooibos tea
- 5g water
- Red currants
- Smoked rape seed oil
- Hay

Steps:
1. Add all ingredients in stockpot, bring to the boil then simmer gently for one hour.
2. Pass the stock, keep the mushrooms.
3. Reduce the stock further if necessary and season.
4. Dry the leftover mushrooms to be freeze-dried and turned into powder.
5. Mix the ingredients then store for service.
6. Boil water and pour over the tea. Allow to steep for 3 minutes then pass.
7. Place the hay in a tea jug, heat the consomme and pour in. Allow to infuse 5 minutes.
8. In a ceramic cup, place red currants and 3 drops of smoke oil.
9. Pour consomme at the table.

Other details:

text:
Recipe ID: IMG_5780_parsed
Name: Sorbetto alla Barbabietola

Ingredients:
- 200gr di mele gialla
- 200gr di ananas
- 100gr di barbabietola
- 150gr di acqua

Steps:
1. Tagliare le mele con la pelle e l'ananas a cubettoni.
2. Spolverarli di zucchero di canna e mettere in forno a 150 gradi per 45 minuti a ventola bassa.
3. Frullare tutti gli ingredienti e passare in setaccio.
4. Aggiungere lo sciroppo 60 brix fino ad un grado zuccherino di 35 x elaborazioni.

Other details:
notes: Ideale per piatti salati.

name: Kombucha de menta
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2090_parsed
Name: Kombucha de menta

Ingredients:
- 2.5 l agua
- 2 bolsitas de menta
- 150 g azucar blanco
- Trozo de kombucha

Steps:
1. Hervir el agua y anadir la menta deshojada.
2. Quitar del fuego, colar y anadir el azucar.
3. Dejar infusionar 15 minutos.
4. Pasado el tiempo, colar y dejar enfriar.
5. Anadir el trozo de kombucha al liquido previamente fermentado.
6. Tapar el frasco y dejar fermentar hasta el punto de embotellar.
7. Si llega a ese punto, embotellar y dejar en nevera una semana antes de usar.

Other details:
author: Maggie, 2017

name: Crio-Concentrado de Manzana
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2121_parsed
Name: Crio-Concentrado de Manzana

Ingredients:
- 20 kg manzana Granny Smith
- 10 l agua
- 50 g acido ascorbico
- Pectinex Ultra SP-L
- Goma Xantana granulada

Steps:
1. Prepara un bano de agua fria y acido ascorbico.
2. Sacar el corazon de las manzanas, cortarlas en cuartos y sumergirlas en el bano de acido ascorbico durante unos minutos para evitar la oxidacion del zumo de manzana.
3. Licuarlas manzanas.
4. Envasar el licuado en bolsas de vacio usando el programa de maximo vacio para evitar que queden burbujas de aire en la bolsa.
5. Congelar.
6. Picar el zumo congelado en la picadora de hielo para conseguir un granizado de manzana.
7. Servir 4 o 5 cucharadas de granizado de manzana en el tambor de la Robot Coupe Prescolis cl40. Activar la licuadora y recoger el zumo que se extrae por centrifugacion.
8. Parar la centrifugacion cuando se observa que el granizado de manzana ha dejado de ser verde para pasar a ser blanco.
9. Desechar el hielo blanco.
10. Anadir 30 gotas de Pectinex Ultra SP-L por litro de crio-concentrado.
11. Dejar actuar las enzimas durante 48 h, sin agitar ni remover para que se decanten las impurezas.
12. Extraer el zumo crio-concentrado y clarificado con cuidado de no enturbiarlo.
13. Texturizar con goma xantana granulada usando 0.2 g por litro de crio-concentrado.
14. Envasar al vacio en bolsas de 150 ml.

Other details:

name: Jin Doo Sauce
text:
Recipe ID: Jin Doo Sauce_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Jin Doo Sauce

Ingredients:

- half Egg (mixed)

- 4 tbsp Water

Steps:

2. Marinade the meat for at least 20mins
3. Melt rock sugar with water
4. Mix the rest of ingredient together to make the sauce
5. Thicken with cornstarch water

name: Sauce Caesar
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_4822_parsed
Name: Sauce Caesar

Ingredients:
- 60 g de jaunes

- 20 cl de vinaigre blanc

Steps:
1. Dans un cul de poule mettre les jaunes, la moutarde, le vinaigre, les anchois, le parmesan, le jus de citron, le sel et le poivre.
2. Mixer le tout.
3. Monter l'huile d'arachide et l'huile d'olive comme une mayonnaise, puis a la fin estragon hache.

name: Artichoke Preparation
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3785_parsed
Name: Artichoke Preparation

Ingredients:


Steps:
1. Wash artichokes and wrap in foil.
2. Bake in the oven at 200 degrees for 1 hour.
3. Once soft, scrape skins to remove flesh.
4. Dehydrate the skins.
5. Once dry, fry at 180 degrees until light and golden.
6. Press flat as soon as they come out of the oil.
7. Keep in an airtight container.

Other details:

id: Classic Pork Belly Lu ro fan_Sheet1_0_parsed
name: Classic Pork Belly
text:
Recipe ID: Classic Pork Belly Lu ro fan_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Classic Pork Belly

Ingredients:
- 15 kg Pork belly
- 720 ml Light soya
- 630 ml Dark soya
- 900 ml Shaohsing wine
- 30 Spring onion
- 30 g Garlic (crushed)
- 280 g Ginger
- Water to fill
- 30 g Star anise
- 262.5 g Rock sugar
- 15 g Garlic powder
- 44.5 g Whole dried chilli
- 62.5 g Cinnamon stick

Steps:
1. Weigh pork belly
2. Cut to pieces. Roughly 9x18cm (short side to be against grain)
3. Measure liquid
4. Set Rational to 200. Braise until soft overnight
5. Place all pork in the gastro, pour in liquid
6. Into Rational, bring to boil and turn temp down to 95°C for overnight
7. 9am: Take pork out and rest
8. Pour the lard into separate container and sauce into another
9. Chop pork 5-10mm into small ice cream containers (against grain)
10. Reduce sauce by 1/2 upstairs at setting
11. Skim lard and store away
12. Cool the sauce and store away
13. HANDOVER: cut a box of pork into quarters. Bun count. Portion count.

Other details:
total_time: 262 mins + overnight
notes: Melt rock sugar in water

name: Fagottino di patata ripieno di ragusano con guanciale e cipollotto croccante
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_5718_parsed
Name: Fagottino di patata ripieno di ragusano con guanciale e cipollotto croccante

Ingredients:
- 1 kg di patate rosse
- 250 g di farina
- 2 uova
- 20 g di grana
- noce moscata
- sale
- pepe
- 300 g di ragusano
- 50 g di burro
- 50 g di farina
- 450 g di latte
- pepe nero in grani
- 50 g di sale
- ossa e scarti di maiale
- concentrato
- 1 guanciale
- 10 cipollotti

Steps:
1. Lessare le patate, bollire e gli gnocchi; passare al passaverdure e impastare.
2. Stendere l'impasto con un mattarello dello spessore di circa mezzo centimetro.
3. Coppare con un coppapasta di 10 cm di diametro.
4. Mettere al centro un po' di fonduta di ragusano precedentemente preparata al robot.
5. Chiudere gli gnocchi a fagottino.
6. Intanto preparare il fondo di ragusano.
7. Impostare il robot con coltello e fare fonduta impostare 400 g di ragusano, 50 g di burro, 50 g di farina, sale e noce moscata.
8. Aggiungere 450 g di latte, portare a 85°C e tenere al caldo.
9. Preparare un fondo classico di maiale e appena pronto legare con un po' di salsa concentrato.
10. Mettere un guanciale sottovuoto da cuocere tutta notte a 65°C a vapore.
11. Cuocere 10 min circa a 85°C a vapore.
12. Cipollotti in acqua e saltati al burro.
13. Guanciale rigenerato sempre sottovuoto a 60°C nel roner.
14. Tagliare sottile e versare carne e salsa sopra lo gnocco.
15. Finire con cipollotto rosolato in padella.

Other details:

text:

Steps:

4. Espolvorear con polvo de chukrut y servir bien caliente.

name: Leek, Chicken and Chive
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3778_parsed
Name: Leek, Chicken and Chive

Ingredients:
- 1 kg leeks (1 portion)
- 50g chives
- 100g grapeseed oil
- 10g rosemary
- 0.25g xantana
- 60g chicken reduced stock
- 30g rosemary
- 300g grapeseed oil

Steps:
1. Cut leek tops off.
2. Break down leeks to remove some of the outside layers.
3. Char leeks yakitori until black.
4. Peel back to expose hearts. Check if they need cooking.
5. Trim leek hearts to 60cm.
6. Vacuum in neutral oil, 6 hearts per portion.
7. Blend in the thermos mix for 3 minutes at 70 degrees.
8. Pass and ice.
9. Portion at 25g.
10. Pick rosemary off stalk.
11. Vacuum together and put in hot box overnight.
12. Strain.

Other details:
extras: For rosemary

name: Baba' limoncello di capri
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_5795_parsed
Name: Baba' limoncello di capri

Ingredients:
- farina 200 g
- sale 2 g
- lievito 6 g
- zucchero 25 g
- burro 25 g
- uova 2
- amido di mais 80 g
- vaniglia
- frutta fresca affettata
- zucchero semolato 500 g
- scorza di arancio 1
- scorza di limone 1
- limoncello 300 ml
- panna 200 g
- zucchero 250 g

Steps:
1. Impastare tutti gli ingredienti salvo il burro.
2. Quando la pasta si stacca dalle pareti del frullatore, aggiungere il burro fuso tiepido.
3. Quando la pasta si stacca dalle pareti del frullatore, lasciar gonfiare.
4. Suddividere l'impasto in stampi imburrati, a mano o con una tasca.
5. Lasciar lievitare l'impasto a volume normale.
6. Cuocere a 200 gradi per 25 minuti.
7. La durata della cottura dipende dalle teglie, dal colore e dall'essiccatura.
8. Sformare i baba appena cotti.
9. Portare a ebollizione.
10. Mescolare gli ingredienti dello sciroppo.
11. Immergere i baba nello sciroppo, girarli con una schiumarola.
12. Lasciare in infusione.
13. Servire i baba freddi, devono essere ben bagnati.

Other details:

name: Ostra y velo madre de arroz
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2085_parsed
Name: Ostra y velo madre de arroz

Ingredients:
- 1 uni. ostra frescor
- 20 ml. aceite de sesamo
- 100 ml. salmuera 3%
- c/s tallos de perejil picado
- 4 uni. laminas quebradas de masa madre de arroz
- madre de arroz 20 g
- 80 g madre de arroz
- 10 g hoja de albahaca
- 40 g aceite de oliva
- c/s aceite girasol

Steps:
1. Reservar las ostras en refrigeracion hasta servicio.
2. Confitar los ajos con aceite de oliva durante 4 horas.
3. Colar y reservar el pure para el acabado.
4. Deshidratar a 50°C durante 4 horas o hasta secas y quebrar.
5. Pincelar aceite de girasol sobre un silpat.
6. Extender la masa madre de arroz.
7. Pincelar el lado opuesto sobre la grasa y estirar la masa madre de arroz.
8. Pasado el tiempo, disponer en una plancha a maxima temperatura durante 10 segundos.
9. Verter poco de agua y taparlas con una campana.
10. Pasados 4 minutos, con mucho cuidado, abrir la plancha y reservar el agua de ostras.
11. Una vez abiertas, limpiarlas con salmuera tibia para eliminar la suciedad.
12. En un cuenco, disponer la ostra caliente.
13. En una jarra, mezclar los tallos de perejil, el aceite de ajo y la madre de arroz.
14. Disponer encima de la ostra.
15. Tapar con la masa madre de arroz.

Other details:
author: Mugaritz 2017

name: Pastel de arroz negro fermentado con Koshu
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2099_parsed
Name: Pastel de arroz negro fermentado con Koshu

Ingredients:
- 150g arroz Yume Nishiki
- 350ml agua
- 15.9g koji kin

Steps:
1. Limpiar el arroz sin agua 3 veces, cambiando el agua hasta que salga transparente.
2. Dejar el arroz en el cocedor durante 30 minutos.
3. Cocer durante 37 minutos en programa 'White Rice'.
4. Desinfectar las bandejas que se utilizaran para esta elaboracion con alcohol.
5. Estirar el arroz sobre una bandeja y espolvorear el koji kin de forma uniforme encima del arroz tibio que estara a unos 30°C.
6. Formar un monton de arroz con mucho cuidado para que los granos esten pegajosos.
7. Estirar el arroz sobre una bandeja y cubrir con un pano.
8. Doblar el pano sobre si para que tenga alrededor de 1.5 cm de espesor.
9. Fermentar el arroz en armario caliente a 30°C durante 12 horas.
10. Volver a llamar y hacer agujeros hasta el fondo.
11. Fermentar entre 24 a 36 horas a 21°C.
12. El pano y el arroz deben mantenerse siempre humedos.
13. Pasado el tiempo, guardar el arroz envuelto en el pano y en bandeja con film agujereado en refrigeracion para detener la fermentacion.

Other details:
servings: 2 gastronomos

name: Manzana/Peras Fermentadas
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2106_parsed
Name: Manzana/Peras Fermentadas

Ingredients:


Steps:
1. Para el exito de la receta la limpieza de las superficies donde se va a trabajar, los utensilios que se van a utilizar y las manos del manipulador es crucial. Todo debe desinfectarse con Etanol.
2. Se trabaja con un microorganismo vivo, un hongo, el Penicillium roquefortis y el Penicillium candidum por lo que sus condiciones de vida: T. humedad, pH y disponibilidad de nutrientes determinaran en gran medida su crecimiento y en ocasiones, imprevisible.
3. El microorganismo morira por encima de los 35°C.
4. El microorganismo debe almacenarse en el congelador.
5. El Penicillium candidum crece con mayor fuerza que el roquefortis, asi que a la hora de pinchar las peras/manzanas hay que asegurarse que no se sobreponga el Penicillium candidum sobre el roquefortis.

Other details:

steps: Para el exito de la receta la limpieza de las superficies donde se va a trabajar, los utensilios que se van a utilizar y las manos del manipulador es crucial. Todo debe desinfectarse con Etanol.

Se trabaja con un microorganismo vivo, un hongo, el Penicillium roquefortis y el Penicillium candidum por lo que sus condiciones de vida: T. humedad, pH y disponibilidad de nutrientes determinaran en gran medida su crecimiento y en ocasiones, imprevisible.
El microorganismo morira por encima de los 35°C.
El microorganismo debe almacenarse en el congelador.

El Penicillium candidum crece con mayor fuerza que el roquefortis, asi que a la hora de pinchar las peras/manzanas hay que asegurarse que no se sobreponga el Penicillium candidum sobre el roquefortis.

name: Goose Two Ways
text:
Recipe ID: Goose two ways 1_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Goose Two Ways

Ingredients:
- 1 kg Goose Fat
- 1 kg Sliced shallot
- 5 kg Goose
- 10 L master stock
- 50 g Ginger
- 500 g Spring onion
- 250 ml Shao xin wine
- 0.5 tsp Fermented Red Chillies
- 1 tbsp Aged Soy Sauce
- 1 tsp Finely Chopped Spring Onion
- Goose Breasts
- Very Fine Julienned Ginger
- Goose Fat Emulsions
- 300 ml Goose broth
- 25 g Fermented mustard greens
- 1 pinch white peppercorn
- 1 tsp goose fat

Steps:
1. Brine the bird in 5% salt brine, 1 tbsp ground toasted sichuan pepper for 48hr
2. Take out of the brine, pat dry
3. Let it air dry in walk in fridge at least overnight
4. Deep fry the shallot in goose fat until golden
5. Before cooking, always double check the skin is properly dried
6. Set Josper to about 320-350C
7. Place the goose in a tray where it can collect the fat from
8. Pop into the josper oven to roast for 2mins, turn and roast for another 2min
9. Take out, cover with tin foil and rest for 30mins
10. Take the leg off, and poach
11. Repeat roasting the crown for another 3 times
12. The internal temperature should reach about 55C
13. Always probe to check if it needs more or less cooking
14. Thinly sliced the goose breasts to 1-2mm slices, about 9-11 slices
15. Serve with finely julienned ginger on one side
16. 1st cook the whole goose, then take the leg off
17. Brown the trimmings, carcass and bones
18. Add the browned bones, ginger and spring onion, Shao Xin wine and the stock into the pot
19. Simmer the stock for 4 hrs. skim as you go.
20. Drain and keep the clear broth to use for poaching goose legs
21. Debone and string tie the goose legs to nice long piece
22. Poach the goose leg in the goose broth for 1.5hrs, simmering. Check sizes!
23. Bring the goose broth to boil, add the mustard greens
24. Gently bring back to simmer. Taste the broth as the mustard greens could be salty. Not to over boil as it makes broth cloudy
25. Slice the goose legs into 3mm slices. Warm it up gently
26. Lay it neatly over the top of mustard green, pour broth over
27. Remove the seeds and chop the fermented chillies very fine
28. In each ramekin, put in 1tsp Fermented red chilli, 1 tsp spring onion and top with 1tbsp aged soy

Other details:
notes: ['Crispy shallot used for lard rice', 'DO NOT pre mix this sauce. Aged soy is precious.', 'No aggressive boiling, Skim as you go. No sous vide on duck leg. Broth must be clear.']

name: Beef Shortrib Xian Bing
text:
Recipe ID: Beef Shortrib Xian Bing_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Beef Shortrib Xian Bing

Ingredients:
- 500g Short Rib Mix
- 350g Veal Kidney
- 35g Diced Ginger
- 125g Black Pepper Sauce
- 63g Spring Onion finely Chopped
- 2 tbsp Shao Xin Wine
- Salt
- Blitzed Green Sichuan Pepper
- White Pepper

Steps:
1. Clean and cut the kidney to small cubes about 1cm cube
2. In a wok, fry off the kidney with oil
3. Season the kidney with salt, white pepper and blitzed green sichuan pepper. Taste! And adjust
4. Take the kidney out of the wok, add shao xin wine in to deglaze
5. In a mixing bowl, add in all ingredients
6. Break the shortrib a bit, but not entirely
7. Store in fridge

name: Yeast Sandwich
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3764_parsed
Name: Yeast Sandwich

Ingredients:
- For the toasted yeast puree
- 25g Dried yeast
- 250g Unsalted butter
- For the yeast ice cream
- 625g Double cream
- 25g Yeast puree previously made
- 2g Xanthan
- 4 Egg yolks
- 75g Sugar
- 2.5g Salt
- For the yeast biscuit
- 100g Grated parmesan
- 150g Strong flour
- 50g Butter
- 250g Fresh egg whites
- 5g Salt

Steps:
1. Make light brown butter.
2. Add yeast and keep cooking. Whisk continuously.
3. Once dissolved, cook on medium heat to evaporate water.
4. The mixture will split separating the butter fat.
5. Strain off the excess fat. Repeat this process 5 times.
6. Remove from the heat and add a few drops of water to emulsify.
7. Whisk until emulsified.
8. Season with salt and reserve in the fridge.
9. Warm the cream in a pan.
10. Add yeast puree and xanthan and blend.
11. Allow the mixture to cool and stir in the egg yolks and sugar.
12. Pass through a fine chinois and fill 11.5 rectangle moulds.
13. Freeze the mixture.
14. Once the biscuit is carefully demoulded, store in a container in the freezer.
15. Blend all the ingredients together and pass through a fine chinois.
16. Build a 1mm thick stencil on 15cm x 5cm silicon spread the rectangle.
17. Bake for 4 minutes at 180C with 60% humidity.
18. Remove from tray and allow to cool.
19. Discard the broken or deformed biscuits.

Other details:
temperature: 180C
humidity: 60%
notes: Discard the broken or deformed biscuits.

name: Colombe 2° Impasto
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_5809_parsed
Name: Colombe 2° Impasto

Ingredients:
- 5000 tutto il 1° impasto
- 833 farina panettone
- 1900 burro
- 1000 zucchero
- 316 tuorli
- 380 acqua
- 303 miele
- 180 vaniglia
- 10 sale
- 3,5 aroma di mandorla
- 1,5 aroma di arancia
- 500 cubetti di cedro
- 3000 uvetta
- 1000 arancia

Steps:
1. Unire al 1° impasto con farina, tuorli, sale, vaniglia, aroma e un po' di acqua.
2. Impastare fino a ottenere un impasto liscio e omogeneo.
3. Aggiungere il burro morbido e incorporare bene.
4. Aggiungere lo zucchero e il miele.
5. Impastare fino a ottenere un impasto elastico.
6. Aggiungere i cubetti di cedro e l'uvetta.
7. Lasciare riposare l'impasto per 30 minuti.
8. Dividere l'impasto in porzioni e formare le colombe.
9. Lasciare lievitare fino a raddoppio.
10. Cuocere in forno preriscaldato a 180°C per circa 40-45 minuti.

Other details:
note: La quantità di acqua dipende dall'assorbimento della farina. Si consiglia che la farina usata abbia almeno tre mesi di stagionatura.

name: Victoria Pineapple
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_5790_parsed
Name: Victoria Pineapple

Ingredients:
- Cooking liquor: 200g water
- Galabex sugar: 150g
- Lemongrass: 2 pcs
- Kaffir lime leaves: 4 pcs
- Vanilla pods: 2
- Java pepper: 4 pcs
- Pineapple juice: 500g
- Ginger juice: 20g
- Havana dark rum: 48g
- Butter: 150g
- Fresh pineapple juice: 1L
- Galabex sugar: 150g
- Gellan: 12g
- Agar agar: 12g

Steps:
1. Bring water, Galabex sugar, syrup, crushed lemongrass, grated vanilla pods, chopped kaffir lime leaves, and Java pepper to boil.
2. Cool down and bag with all the spices. Leave to infuse 30 mins. Add all the juice and the rum.
3. Store in the fridge. (Label 5 days)
4. For half a pineapple get 150g of butter in a pan with 3 Java pepper, 2 kaffir lime leaves, 1/4 of lemongrass and half the vanilla pod.
5. Place 1/4 of pineapple and baste it with the butter.
6. Put the pan in the oven at 160C for 5 mins.
7. Take it and check for liquor. On stove keep on basting the pineapple.
8. Again in the oven for another 5 mins.
9. Check if it's cooked. Then leave to rest on a cooling rack tray.
10. Pass the excess of cooking liquor and keep it for service.
11. Spice the vanilla. Java pepper, kaffir lime leaves and lemongrass in the oven 3 mins, baste and dry on a jay-cloth.
12. The roasted pineapple is meant to be sent warm.
13. Add agar and gellan and cook for 1 min.
14. Leave to cool down in container and pass.
15. Once fully set, freeze. (Label 1 month)

Other details:
notes: The roasted pineapple is meant to be sent warm.

name: Crema acida de maiz majado y avellanas
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2080_parsed
Name: Crema acida de maiz majado y avellanas

Ingredients:
- 1 lata de maiz (275g)
- 50 ml agua
- 4 g koji-in
- 200 g agua
- 20 g pimienta de jamaica
- 100 g avellana
- 200 g agua

Steps:
1. Triturar el maiz en lata.
2. Anadir 50 ml de agua en thermomix durante 15 minutos a 60°C.
3. Reservar el maiz en refrigeracion hasta un maximo de 3 dias.
4. Infusionar en agua hirviendo la pimienta de jamaica durante 1 hora, colar y reservar.
5. En una thermomix, triturar las avellanas con el agua durante 15 minutos.
6. Pasar la mezcla por superbag y reservar en refrigeracion.

Other details:
servings: Para 4 personas

name: Duck Egg and Smoked Potato
text:

Name: Duck Egg and Smoked Potato

Ingredients:
- 350g Ratte potato
- 300g Water from cook
- 25g Smoked butter
- 225g Cream
- 6 Duck eggs

Steps:
1. Cook potatoes in water with skin on.
2. Once potatoes are cooked remove from water and keep warm.
3. Peel the potatoes and blend together with the rest of the ingredients.
4. Pass them through a fine mesh.
5. Fill an iSi canister and charge twice.
6. Store in the water bath at 72C.
7. Cook the duck eggs at 62C for 1.5 hours.
8. Store at 60 for service.
9. Crack open the egg and place in the centre of the bowl.
10. Cover with the potato foam and serve.

name: La emulsion en tendon y grasas
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_1505_parsed
Name: La emulsion en tendon y grasas

Ingredients:
- 150 g grasa de txuleta
- 150 g grasa de vaca
- Glace
- 300 g de tendon

Steps:
1. Colocar la grasa en una cazoy fundir hasta llegar a 65 grados de temperatura.
2. Agregar el glace y mezclar hasta disolver.
3. En porciones de 300 gramos, servir 300 g de tendon y agregar a la vaca en forma de hilo periodico.
4. Mezclar periodicamente durante 3 minutos a la misma temperatura.
5. Colocar en moldes de 0.5 cm y 10 cm de largo.
6. Colocadas en papeles sulfurizados, reservar sin refrigerar hasta el emplatado.

Other details:
acabado: Servir la lamina de tendon sobre el hueso de vaca. Servir el hueso encima de la vajilla. Para chupar.
source: Mugaritz 2017

name: Rice Roll
text:
Recipe ID: Rice Roll_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Rice Roll

Ingredients:
- 90 g Rice Flour
- 30 g Potato Starch
- 10 g Tapioca Starch, fine one
- 1 pinch Salt
- 260 g Water
- Veg Oil, for brushing on the tray and chopping board

Steps:
1. Mix everything together well
2. Brush a thin layer of veg oil over the tray
3. Pre steam the oven
4. Pour the mixture onto the tray
5. Put in to steam for a 30sec once it's slightly set
6. Take out and tilt the tray until it's evenly spread
7. Steam for another a minute until it's fully set
8. Take out the rice film gently onto an oiled surface
9. Cut to 8cm strips
10. Roll and store in a container with baking sheet layers
11. Cling film to cover. Touching the rice roll
12. Store in fridge until service to reheat

Other details:

name: Monkfish and Pistachio
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3780_parsed
Name: Monkfish and Pistachio

Ingredients:
- 5% salt brine for the monkfish
- 300g monkfish
- 300g pistachio paste
- 30g onions
- 100g leeks
- 800g rice vinegar
- 50g garlic
- 200g white onion
- 50g pistachio paste
- 30g pistachio paste
- 140g blanched spinach

Steps:
1. Prep monkfish and brine for 20 minutes (leave overnight preferably).
2. Set the circulator to 62 degrees with an oil bath.
3. Insert monkfish and drop in oil.
4. Cook until 44 degrees.
5. Remove from the yakitori to dry briefly.
6. Ready for a final brush with burnt seed mole.
7. There should be a nice rainbow on the fish.
8. Finely chop the garlic, leeks, and onion, then brown.
9. Add the vinegar and reduce. Once reduced, add the miso and cook for a further 2 minutes.
10. Finally add nuts, vegetable stock, and pistachio.
11. Add all to the boil.
12. Remove from heat and blend to a smooth sauce.
13. Season.
14. Blend base with remaining ingredients.
15. Blend three times, pass, and vacuum pack.
16. Freeze.

Other details:

name: Nata con Fresas
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2103_parsed
Name: Nata con Fresas

Ingredients:
- 70 ml de kombucha de nata
- 300 ml de liquido de fresas
- 10 ml de aceite de kombucha madre
- 10 g de azucar

Steps:
1. En un recipiente, mezclar con cuidado el azucar, los ingredientes y tapar con una tela.
2. Dejar fermentar entre 7 y 10 dias.
3. Retirar todo exceso de zumo de fresas, agregar 100 g de fresas en cuadrados de 7 x 7 cm.
4. Reservar.
5. Triturar las fresas hasta tener 30% de su peso en zumo.
6. Triturar el liquido de fresas durante 4 minutos a velocidad media y reservar en un bano de agua con hielo.

Other details:
acabado: 120 g de kombucha de nata
presentacion: Con una espatula, embarrar la madre de kombucha con la nata de fresa. Emplatar de manera casual. Como un lienzo con volumenes.
mugaritz: 2017

name: Chocolate, Passion Fruit and Summer Savory
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3789_parsed
Name: Chocolate, Passion Fruit and Summer Savory

Ingredients:
- 50g Summer savory
- 300g Neutral oil
- 200g Sugar
- 100g Egg white
- 100g Water
- 250g Milk
- 75g Yolks
- 125g Sugar
- 1.6g Gelatine
- 120g Chocolate
- 110g Passion fruit puree
- 100g Black sesame

Steps:
1. Pick all leaves from the stalk.
2. Blanch the blanched leaves with the oil in the thermomix at 70C for 5 min.
3. Blend the mixture and strain.
4. Pass through muslin onto an ice bath.
5. Store in fridge.
6. Add little water to the sugar and cook to 121C.
7. While the sugar is cooking, start whipping the egg whites.
8. Once the sugar syrup has reached 121C add it over the meringue.
9. Cold the meringue's sable and stiff add the cold the meringue.
10. Store in piping bag.
11. Bring the milk to the boil.
12. Add the boiling milk to the yolks.
13. Cook the mixture to 84C.
14. Add the gelatine to the chocolate.
15. Using cocktail blend the emulsion.
16. Blender in the passion fruit puree.
17. Scoop in the cream and fold into the chocolate.
18. Store in container in the fridge.
19. In a pan bring the water and the sugar to 117C.
20. Once it reaches temperature add the black sesame and mix until it is completely covered.

Other details:

- 200g grapeseed oil

Steps:
1. Blanch and peel skin of tomatoes.
2. Add xanthan to liquid with orange zest and salt.
3. Compress in bovic liquid and reserve.
4. Cut into four.
5. Compress in seasoned tomato juice.
6. Reserve juice in a bottle to garnish dish.
7. Peel lemon skin thinly.
8. Vacuum pack with sugar and water for one week until softened and looks like jam.
9. Pick all the leaves off the branches.
10. Blanch, squeeze water and add to oil.
11. Blend until smooth and pass once.

Other details:
extra: Extract water from the lab. Garnish with long pepper.

name: Arroz pulido cremoso semiabual con setas
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_1493_parsed
Name: Arroz pulido cremoso semiabual con setas

Ingredients:
- 400 g seta enoki
- 12 g aceite oliva
- 13 g ajo
- 30 g cebolla
- 32 g risotto de arroz crudo
- 4 g caldo de bacalao 25 brix
- 40 g cabeza de enoki

Steps:
1. Cortar las cabezas de enoki y reservar 10 g por racion.
2. Cortar los tallos del enoki del tamano del arroz pulido y reservar 15 g por racion.
3. Nacer el caldo de enoki con el condimento Mugaritz (cocinar 20 minutos).
4. Colado el caldo, anadir un poco de aceite, anadir el arroz y ponerlo a nacarar.
5. Dejar enfriar y racionar 9 g de arroz cocido por persona.
6. Calentar el arroz hasta hervir, mojar con caldo de ave.
7. Incorporar tallos de enoki al arroz (15 g por racion) y mantecar arroz con el caldo de bacalao.
8. Disponer las cabezas de enoki en colador con una lamina de acetato sobre una lamina desecante.
9. Disponer el arroz con los tallos de enoki a un lado del plato.
10. Servir las cabezas ahumadas (10 g por racion) por otro lado.
11. Servir caliente.

Other details:
servings: 4 personas
notes: Mugaritz 2017

name: Fish Stock Recipe
text:
Recipe ID: Fish Dashi_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Fish Stock Recipe

Ingredients:
- 10 Seabass Carcasses
- 8 Spring Onions
- 2 Medium Peeled Gingers

Steps:
1. Make 10% salt water brine. Take the gill off from all the fish. Clean fish and place in salty brine water for 30 minutes.
2. Prepare a big pot of boiling water in the meantime.
3. Take out the carcasses from brine water and blanch them for 10 seconds, doing 3 carcasses at a time.
4. Once done, take out and place in cold water, then wash blood out from spine and all scum from inside.
5. Do not leave them in running water, just wash quickly and immediately drain.
6. While doing the above process, prepare another stock pot with 10 liters of filtered water and bring to a boil.
7. Once water is boiling, place smashed ginger and spring onion, and 10 fish carcasses in the pot. Bring to a boil and simmer for about 1 hour.
8. The temperature of simmering should be enough just for bubbles coming up to the surface.
9. Keep skimming frequently and remove all dirt while cooking, as water circulates well, it extracts better taste.
10. Make sure you skim well and maintain correct temperature of stock for better and cleaner taste.
11. When your stock is ready and tastes right, take all ingredients out and pass through muslin cloth into another pot.
12. It seems very thin compared to western style stock, but that’s what you are looking for: a clean, light flavor.
13. Concentrate more on the cleanness and freshness of the taste through your gorge and nose.
14. Remember, stock making is the basic of a chef in Asia, and it only needs your attention and care for food.

Other details:
total_time: 1 hour

name: Caldo de Gallina
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2116_parsed
Name: Caldo de Gallina

Ingredients:
- 1.5 kg Gallina
- 1/2 kg Cebolla
- 1/2 kg Ajo pelado
- 2 kg Garbanzo seco
- 15 l Agua

Steps:
1. Remojar los garbanzos la vispera.
2. Trocear la gallina separando las pechugas, los muslos con las piernas, las alas y las carcasas.
3. Separar las piezas de gallina en bandejas con papel sulfurizado.
4. Asar en el horno a 220°C hasta que la gallina este muy dorada. Aproximadamente 60 min.
5. Confitlar los ajos con suficiente aceite de oliva como para tener un adorno uniforme.
6. Cortar la cebolla en cubos regulares (mirepoix) y tostarla en suficiente aceite hasta conseguir un caramelizado uniforme y muy intenso.
7. Introducir la cebolla y los ajos pochados bien escurridos del aceite donde se confitaron en una olla de presion. Agregar la gallina y los garbanzos y cubrir con el agua.
8. Cerrar bien la olla de presion y llevar al fuego. Mantener un fuego intenso hasta que se libere la presion y entonces bajar el fuego al minimo.
9. Mantener asi durante 2 horas.
10. Enfriar la olla de presion antes de abrirla.
11. Colar el caldo usando un chino. Presionar bien la carne para obtener la mayor cantidad de caldo posible.
12. Colocar el caldo en un recipiente y cubrir con film. Enfriar en el abatidor de temperatura hasta que se solidifique la grasa en la superficie.
13. Retirar la grasa por completo y colocar el caldo en una olla alta para reducirlo.
14. Reducir el caldo hasta obtener 5.5 l.
15. Pasar por un micro colador, ajustar el punto de sal y reservar en bolsas de vacio, ya sea en refrigeracion (uso semanal) o en congelacion.

Other details:
notes: La grasa de la gallina aportara al caldo mucho sabor. Se debe introducir en la olla al elaborar el caldo.

name: Infusion de pino y vainilla ahumada
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2089_parsed
Name: Infusion de pino y vainilla ahumada

Ingredients:
- 2 l de agua
- 50 g de pino
- 16 g de vainilla

Steps:
1. Lavar el pino muy bien.
2. Poner en bolsa de vacio con el agua y cocinar 12 horas a 80°C.
3. Abrir la vainilla ahumada entera por 2 horas.
4. Colar la infusion y agregarle la vainilla ahumada.
5. Envasar de nuevo y dejar por 8 horas.
6. Colar y reservar.

Other details:
servings: Para 2

Name: Sacher

Ingredients:
- 1000 biscotto sacher
- 1250 burro
- 1500 cioccolato 66%
- 625 tuorli
- 700 uova
- 400 zucchero
- 1000 farina 160W
- 1125 farina di mandorle
- 500 albume
- 125 zucchero
- 400 panna
- 100 zucchero
- 400 guanaja 70%

Steps:
1. Montare i tuorli e le uova e 625 di zucchero.
2. Mescolando a mano aggiungere il cioccolato sciolto con il burro.
3. Le farine setacciate insieme e l'ultimo l'albume montato con rimanente zucchero.
4. Stendere su fogli di carta forno e infornare alla temperatura di 250C con valvola chiusa per 6 - 7M.
5. Bollire la panna con lo zucchero, aggiungere il cioccolato ed emulsionare per 3 - 4M.
6. Peso confettura di albicocche per strato: g 1100

Other details:

name: Taiwanese 16 Spice Black Pork Ribs
text:
Recipe ID: Taiwanese 16 Spice Black Pork Ribs_Pork Ribs Marinade_2_parsed
Name: Taiwanese 16 Spice Black Pork Ribs

Ingredients:
- 300 g Baby Back Ribs
- 1 unit Egg
- 5 g Garlic
- 18 g Michiu Rice Wine or Shaoxing if don't have
- 1 g Baking Powder
- 40 g Corn Flour
- 14 g Superior light soy
- 5 g Sugar
- 2 g White Pepper

Steps:

6. Pre fry the ribs at 160C for 6 Min
7. Let it cool and when one is in order Refry it until Golden and Hot at 180C approx 2-3 min depending on Size of the ribs

name: Butterscotch Sauce
text:

Name: Butterscotch Sauce

Ingredients:
- 500g Caster Sugar
- Pinch Maldon Salt
- 50g Butter
- 1500g Whipping cream

Steps:
1. In a large pot take sugar to a caramel, make sure its all liquid
2. Add salt and add butter, mix on heat until all mixed

4. Simmer for 10 mins until all sugar has dissolved
5. Strain and blast chill with paper touching the top for no skin

Other details:

name: Velo cremoso de patata acida
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2095_parsed
Name: Velo cremoso de patata acida

Ingredients:
- 250 g patatas monalisa
- 3000 g agua
- 1500 g de kombucha
- 1500 g de te de kombucha
- 500 g de azucar
- 80 g de patata monalisa
- 20 g de mantequilla
- 1.2 g de xantana
- 40 g de queso parmesano
- 4 uni. madre de kombu
- 40 g pure de patata
- 0.5 g polvo de queso

Steps:
1. Cortar la patata en trozos irregulares y cocer en agua hasta que este casi deshecha. Triturar, laminar y enfriar.
2. Mezclar este liquido con azucar y con la cerveza.
3. Desinfectar este liquido con la kombucha.
4. Filmar, hacer respiraderos en el film y dejar fermentar 48 horas a 3 ambiente.
5. Cocer la patata con piel y triturar en thermomix el resto de ingredientes, a velocidad 5 80°C durante 12 minutos.
6. Triturar el tubo en thermomix durante treinta segundos y plancheamos cortado en tacos.
7. Cortar la madre de kombucha en trozos de 35x35 cm con tapasas.
8. A la hora del servicio poner un poco de pure encima el polvo y gratinar en salamandra.

Other details:
servings: Para 4 personas
notes: Mugaritz 2017

name: Sweet Potato Filling
text:
Recipe ID: Sweet Potato Filling_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Sweet Potato Filling

Ingredients:
- 1100 g Sweet potato
- 100 g Ginger
- 150 g Onion
- 40 g Red Chilli
- 90 g Tong Choi (aka magic cabbage)
- 1 tsp White pepper
- 300 g Miso
- 70 g Spring onion
- Oil to fry

Steps:
1. Brunoise ginger and red chilli, onion
2. Chop the tong choi fine
3. In a wok caramelise onion, red chilli and tong choi and set aside
4. In a wok, caramelise ginger and set aside
5. In a wok, cook the sweet potato until golden and soften (not too soft) shape should still be in tack
6. Take out the sweet potato, decant into a tray
7. In the tray, mix miso and sweet potato well then spread
8. Spread the mix over a tray, pop into the oven to cook
9. At 180C, 0% moisture, roast the mix for 10 min, check and stir, then 5min then check and stir, and roast for 5 more min. Check and take out. The sweet potato mixture should be cooked through, slightly dried on the surface
10. Add the chopped caramelised onion, red chilli, tong choi, ginger, and spring onion, white pepper to the mix
11. Mix well
12. Once cooled, ready to be used for the dumpling

Other details:
notes: The sweet potato should not be mushy after cooked.

Spread the mix over a tray, pop into the oven to cook

At 180C, 0% moisture, roast the mix for 10 min, check and stir, then 5min then check and stir, and roast for 5 more min. Check and take out. The sweet potato mixture should be cooked through, slightly dried on the surface
Add the chopped caramelised onion, red chilli, tong choi, ginger, and spring onion, white pepper to the mix
Mix well
Once cooled, ready to be used for the dumpling

other_details.notes: The sweet potato should not be mushy after cooked.

name: Potato and Yeast
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3815_parsed
Name: Potato and Yeast

Ingredients:
- 1 kg Rattee potato
- 200g Fresh yeast
- 100g Neutral oil
- 30g Fried yeast
- 15g Egg yolk
- 15g Vinegar
- 10g Soy sauce
- 50g Chives
- 100g Grapeseed oil

Steps:
1. Peel the potatoes. Boil in salt water until soft.
2. Roast in oven with oil until golden brown.
3. In pan heat oil and cook fresh yeast.
4. Cook till yeast and golden crumbs form.
5. Once cooked, blend and pass through fine chinois. Dry yeast to the paste and keep the oil.
6. Heat all the ingredients in a pan and bring to the boil.
7. Using a stick blender emulsify and pass through fine chinois.
8. Store in container in the fridge.
9. Blend in the thermos mix for 3 minutes at 70 degrees.
10. Pass and ice.

name: Tropical pina colada (terrazza 2010)
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_5805_parsed
Name: Tropical pina colada (terrazza 2010)

Ingredients:
- 1 ananas a cubetti
- 1000 acqua
- 500 zucchero
- 1 stecca di cannella
- mezza bacca di vaniglia
- 3 anice stellato
- 200 latte di mandorle
- 100 panna
- 350 purea della passione
- 150 zucchero
- 80 acqua
- 2 agar agar
- 5 glucosio
- 25 acqua

Steps:
1. Porre a bollore acqua, zucchero, cannella, vaniglia e anice stellato. Aggiungere l'ananas e lasciare in infusione fino al completo raffreddamento.
2. Mescolare insieme tutti gli ingredienti, passare a uno chinoise, mettere in un siphon e caricare con due cariche di gas.
3. Portare a bollore la purea, il glucosio e l'acqua. Aggiungere l'agar agar, riportare a bollore, aggiungere la gelatina, filtrare il tutto ed abbattere. Conservare a -18°C.

name: Bestiario de pepino de mar
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_1510_parsed
Name: Bestiario de pepino de mar

Ingredients:
- 1 unit. de pepino negro
- 1 unit. de pepino blanco
- 9.8 g de gelatina de garum
- 0.25 g de agar-agar
- 50 g de gelatina de garum
- c/s cucharada sopera

Steps:
1. El pepino negro: Eviscerar el pepino. Restregar los pepinos con sal hasta que el pepino se sienta mas blando y flexible. Escaldar el pepino 10 segundos y enfriar.
2. El pepino blanco: Eviscerar el pepino y enjuagar muy bien. Con el agua hirviendo, escaldar hasta que cuaje, llevar a 80°C. Enfriar hasta que cuaje, y triturar hasta conseguir una textura delicada.
3. La gelatina de garum: Mezclar el agua con el garum y el agar. Llevar a ebullicion y dejar hervir 10 segundos y enfriar.
4. El rollo: Estirar la gelatina de garum con el pepino blanco dentro del pepino negro. Enrollar delicadamente con transglutaminasa en frio. Mantener en refrigerador, y al cortar se mantenga la forma. Refrigerar y cortar de un ancho de cm, mantener en camara, y temperar para el servicio.

Other details:
servings: Para 4 personas

name: Goats Cheese, Peanut and Soy Sauce
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3795_parsed
Name: Goats Cheese, Peanut and Soy Sauce

Ingredients:
- 70g egg white powder
- 210g egg white
- 70g water
- 200g sugar syrup
- 208g hot water
- 60g peanut flour
- 158g freeze dried banana
- 408g sugar syrup
- 350g milk
- 150g goat cheese
- 6g vege gelatine
- 20g cream flour
- 50g milk

Steps:
1. Whip albumin, egg white and sugar syrup on medium speed.
2. Incorporate with base a little at a time and blend.
3. Spread out on a silpat and dehydrate over night at 50C.
4. Heat under salamander and shape to desired texture.
5. Mix the two ingredients together and blend.
6. Leave to rest overnight in fridge.
7. Warm the sugar syrup to pour over the banana and leave to hydrate.
8. Reserve in fridge.
9. Heat milk and dissolve gelatine.
10. Mix with goat cheese.
11. Freeze in paco container but do not fill to the line.
12. Spin in Pacojet when needed.
13. Mix together and bring to boil whisking constantly.
14. Store in bottle in fridge.

Other details:
temperature: 50C

name: Kale and Radicchio Salad
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3816_parsed
Name: Kale and Radicchio Salad

Ingredients:
- 1 Head purple kale
- 200g Mushroom stock
- 50g Red onion
- 25g Red pepper corns
- 40g Elderflower vinegar
- 25g Water
- 1 Pink radicchio
- 200g Pickle onion juice
- 1 Pink radicchio rosella

Steps:
1. Strip all the leaves of the purple kale.
2. Bring the mushroom stock to the boil then pour over the kale leaves so they are covered with the stock.
3. Allow to cool then remove and strain.
4. Grill lightly on the yakitori.
5. Place in the dehydrator overnight.
6. Once dry and crispy remove and store.
7. Thinly slice the onion.
8. Mix all the ingredients together and bring to the boil.
9. Pour the liquid over the onion and allow to cool.
10. Once cooled, strain off the liquid and reserve the red onion.
11. Spread the onion over a silpat and dry in the dehydrator for two days, then blend into a powder.
12. Place the two ingredients in a vacuum bag and seal at 100%.
13. Store in the fridge.
14. Trim the base, wash the leaves and dry and store in fridge.

Other details:

name: Caldo de gamba tostadas
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2109_parsed
Name: Caldo de gamba tostadas

Ingredients:
- 1 kg gambas
- 2 u. cebolla
- 6 dientes de ajo
- 400 g. vino blanco
- 2 hoja laurel
- Sal

Steps:
1. En una olla cocinar la cebolla en juliana y el ajo laminado hasta que la cebolla se carameliz. Agregar el laurel y un poco de sal.
2. Desglasar con el vino, continuar cocinando hasta que se evapore el alcohol.
3. En otra olla con abundante aceite de oliva, tostar (NO QUEMAR) las gambas por ambos lados.
4. Terminar machacando las cabezas de las gambas para que suelten su jugo.
5. Desglasar con vino blanco.
6. Agregar las verduras caramelizadas e integrar todos los elementos removiendo con un espatula.
7. Cubrir con agua a nivel justo y llevar a ebullicion.
8. Desespumar y cocinar a fuego suave con un cartouche encima durante 2 horas.
9. Microfiltrar y reducir hasta 2 Brix.
10. Colar, enfriar, desgrasar, porcionar y almacenar.

Other details:
source: Mugaritz 2016

name: Manzanas Fermentadas
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2096_parsed
Name: Manzanas Fermentadas

Ingredients:
- 4 un. manzanas
- 40 g. mermelada de naranja
- 400 ml. de leche
- 1 g. de starter
- 15 g. sal
- 6 g. pimienta
- 10 g. bayas enebro
- 1 g. clavo de olor

Steps:
1. Disolver el penicillium en leche.
2. Sumergir las manzanas en el bano de roquefortis y en el bano de candidum.
3. Dejarlas fermentar por dias (aprox. 72 h.) hasta que esten suaves y blancas.
4. Rellenar las manzanas fermentadas con la mermelada de naranja.
5. Cocinar a fuego fuerte hasta que se evapore el liquido.
6. Cocinar lentamente hasta obtener una mermelada fina.

Other details:
source: Mugaritz 2017

name: Prawn Mix
text:
Recipe ID: Corn Dog for Simone Rocha (4)_Prawn Mix_2_parsed
Name: Prawn Mix

Ingredients:
- 325g Shrimp
- 130g Pork
- 40g Lardo
- 10g Sesame Oil
- 12g Cornstarch
- 35g Plain Flour
- 1g White pepper
- 4g Salt
- 12g Rice Wine
- 2g Garlic
- 1g Sugar
- 125g Small diced Turnips
- 40g Chopped green Spring Onion

Steps:
1. Blitz all the ingredients apart from Spring Onion and Turnips until smooth and voluptuous.
2. Add the Spring Onion and Turnips to the mix.
3. Put in piping bag, and cut it so that the hole is about 1 inch diameter.
4. On a tray lined with parchment paper, pipe into 18g cylinder of mix, you can cut the mix with a pair of scissors, think of this like churros.
5. You can also do it straight into oil if needed.
6. You can freeze it now for a bit so it holds its shape, and then fry it at 160C for 3-4 minutes.

Other details:

name: Tupinambo asado
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_1513_parsed
Name: Tupinambo asado

Ingredients:
- 4 uni. tupinambo
- 2.5 ml zumo de carne
- 5 ml sirope de arce
- 5 ml vinagre de Jerez
- 5 ml aceite de ajo
- c/s sal

Steps:
1. Lavar el tupinambo con agua y secarlos.
2. Sobre una parrilla, asar cada tupinambo hasta que toda su exterior sea negro.
3. Retirar del calor y dejar reposar en una esquina.
4. El tupinambo tendra su interior jugoso y su exterior pastoso.
5. Disponer unas gotas de aceite y espolvorear con sal.
6. Reservar tapado con film en armario caliente a 60°C.
7. Deshojar el tupinambo y reservar las hojas.
8. Hacer un corte longitudinalmente en el tupinambo justo para extraer la carne sin llegar caido.
9. Reservar la piel.
10. Cocer el jugo de carne en un cazo y anadir el tomillo deshojado y pimienta.
11. Cocer a fuego lento hasta hervir.
12. Disponer el tupinambo en una compotera y verter el jugo de carne.
13. Cerrar el tupinambo con las dos pieles listas que se crearan.
14. Reservar tapado con film en armario caliente a 60°C.
15. Preparar un horno a 120°C y calentar el tupinambo.
16. Servir caliente.

Other details:
servings: 4 personas
temperature: 120°C
notes: Reservar tapado con film en armario caliente a 60°C.

- farina panettoni 323

Steps:
1. Togliere la pelle dal lievito naturale e utilizzare solo la parte interna. Impastare il lievito, l'acqua e la farina. Formare una pagnotta, fare su di essa un taglio a croce e metterla in un recipiente adeguato. Riporre in cella di lievitazione a 30°C per 4 ore circa, e pronta quando ha raggiunto il doppio del volume originario.

Riporre in cella di lievitazione a 30°C per 4 ore circa, e pronta quando ha raggiunto il doppio del volume originario.
3. Seguire il procedimento come per il 1° e 2° rinfresco e pesare 3.000 di lievito. Formare una pagnotta su cui si pratichera un taglio a croce e mettere in cella di lievitazione a 30°C per 4 ore circa. Il rimanente lievito dev'essere avvolto nella tela e legato.

name: Caldo de malviz
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2127_parsed
Name: Caldo de malviz

Ingredients:
- 900 g. huesos de malviz
- 850 g. cebolla caramelizada
- 70 g. brandy
- 30 g. aceite de oliva
- 40 g. tocino ibérico
- 2 l. caldo de ave
- 1 l. caldo del día
- 160 g. avellanas
- 160 g. almendras
- 7 g. perejil

Steps:
1. En una olla calentar el aceite de oliva y el tocino ibérico.
2. Dorar los huesos de malviz en la grasa.
3. Añadir la cebolla caramelizada y desglasar con el brandy.
4. Agregar el caldo de ave y el caldo del día.
5. Reducir hasta obtener un volumen de 1 l.

Other details:
anotacion_previa: Se deben desplumar las malvices con mucho cuidado, intentando preservar al máximo la integridad de la piel de la pechuga. Eviscerar conservando los intestinos intactos para evitar la contaminación. Tanto las visceras como el cabeza, las patas y las puntas de las alas se desecharan. Las pechugas se destinaran al plato mientras y los huesos se usaran para el caldo.

Añadir la cebolla caramelizada y desglasar con el brandy.
Agregar el caldo de ave y el caldo del día.
Reducir hasta obtener un volumen de 1 l.

name: Rice Fermented Veg
text:
Recipe ID: Rice Fermented Veg_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Rice Fermented Veg

Ingredients:
- 1 kg Chilli
- 50 g Salt
- 500 g Congee liquid (1:10=Rice: Water)

Steps:
1. Cook congee in ratio of 1:10= rice:water
2. Leave congee to cool down to 30C
3. Wash the mustard green with cold water
4. Drain properly and salt the leaves
5. Lightly rub the salt into the leaves and line them in glass jar
6. Once the congee is cool down to around 30C (need to be luke warm still)
7. Pass through the warm congee through a sieve and pour into the veg to cover, discard the rice grain
8. Let it ferment for at least a week. May take up to 10 days
9. Taste and refrigerate

Other details:
notes: ['Try whole veg', 'Try chopped up veg', 'Try cheap Jasmin rice', 'Keep an eye on how long it takes to ferment', 'Try fermenting in vac pack bags']

name: Dou Hua Dessert
text:
Recipe ID: Dou Hua Dessert_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Dou Hua Dessert

Ingredients:
- 70 g Rock Sugar Syrup
- 90 g Dou Hua
- 30 g Barley cooked in syrup
- 25 g Rock Sugar Granita
- 454 g Rock Sugar
- 2 L Warm water
- Pearl Barley
- Water
- Rock Sugar

Steps:
1. Preheat a large surface pot.
2. Put the Rock sugar into the pot to melt, spread them out evenly.
3. Keep turning the pan so it doesn't burn.
4. DO NOT leave the pan whilst doing.
5. Once all sugar's melted, add the measured warm water.
6. Bring the syrup up to boil, make sure all sugar's dissolved.
7. Decant into containers to chill.
8. Take what you need to freeze, the rest keep as sugar syrup.
9. DO NOT leave the pan during the process.
10. Freeze in small topperware.
11. Once frozen, take out of container to blitz in thermomix quickly.
12. Put back to freeze, otherwise the sugar sinks to the bottom.
13. The night before, cover barley with water and bring to boil.
14. Once boiled, skim and discard impurities.
15. Drain and vac pack the barley. Then put to FREEZE.
16. Next day, 1:4 pearl barley to water ratio.
17. Put into the pressure cooker to cook until softened.
18. The pre boil and freezing process help shortening the cooking time.
19. Once all soft, reduce, or drain the liquid to it just covers the barley.
20. Add rock sugar, taste.
21. Store in fridge. Do not pre cook a big batch.
22. Can pre cook and freeze the first process big batch.
23. Cook daily or every other day for the second half of the process.

Other details:

name: Squid, Pork and Mushroom
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3777_parsed
Name: Squid, Pork and Mushroom

Ingredients:
- 500g Soy sauce
- 250g Balsamic vinegar
- 250g Rice vinegar
- 50g Grated ginger
- 200g of the pickle juice
- 200g Mushrooms

Steps:
1. Add all the ingredients in a pan.
2. Bring to boil then remove from heat.
3. Leave 20 minutes to infuse the pass.
4. Clean and trim the grolles.
5. Heat pickle juice and pour over the mushrooms.
6. Leave to cool in the pickle juice.
7. Prep and clean the squid.
8. Dry and remove membrane.
9. Cut in half and layer up 5-6 layers high.
10. Cling film and pierce some holes for air to escape.
11. Vacuum pack in one direction and place in blast chiller.
12. Portion at 80g.
13. Slice on number 2.5.
14. Put in the blast chiller.
15. Cut into thin strips and portion 20g.

Other details:

name: Caldo de Cordero
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2115_parsed
Name: Caldo de Cordero

Ingredients:
- 6kg huesos de cordero
- 1.5kg recortes de carne de cordero
- 5 l agua

Steps:
1. Cortar los recortes de carne en trozos de tamano regular.
2. Dorar los huesos y los recortes de cordero en una parrilla encendida con brasa muy caliente. Dorar a 220°C hasta conseguir un color intenso.
3. Juntar los huesos y recortes de cordero tostados en una olla de presion.
4. Cubrir el cordero con el agua.
5. Llevar a hervor y cerrar la olla.
6. Mantener una coccion suave durante 2 horas.
7. Colar el caldo usando un chino. Presionar bien la carne para obtener mayor cantidad de caldo posible.
8. Colocar el caldo en un recipiente y cubrir con film. Enfriar en un bano de agua fria hasta que se solidifique la grasa en la superficie.
9. Retirar la grasa por completo y colar usando un colador fino.
10. Colocar el caldo en una olla alta para reducirlo.
11. Reducir el caldo hasta obtener 25° en refractometro.
12. Ajustar el punto de sal y reservar en bolsas de vacio en porciones de 150 g.

Other details:
servings: Para 8 l

name: Masa madre de arroz
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2077_parsed
Name: Masa madre de arroz

Ingredients:
- 1 arroz blanco
- 500 ml agua
- 350 g de harina de arroz

Steps:
1. En un bote de cristal, disponer 1 arroz blanco y agua.
2. Dejar fermentar a temperatura ambiente durante 3 dias o hasta que la fermentacion genere gas, soplada con burbujas.
3. Para la alimentacion: mezclar 350 g de harina de arroz y 500 ml de agua.
4. Pasar esta mezcla a la masa madre y dejar fermentar en un bote de cristal.

Other details:
notes: El arroz madre actua como un 'starter'. El ciclo de fermentacion es en ciclos de 48 horas aprox, en funcion de la temperatura ambiente. Es muy importante que cuando generamos cantidad de masa, alimentar cada masa individualmente.

text:

Name: Prawn Corn Dog for Simone Rocha

Ingredients:
- Prawn Mix
- CornDog batter

Steps:
1. Make the mix and put it in a piping bag.
2. Pipe it into 18g cylinders.
3. Freeze it to make it easier to handle.
4. Fry at 160°C for 3-4 minutes.
5. Cool it down.
6. Batter it.
7. Prefry the corn dogs and refry at high temperature when needed.

notes: Ideally the presentation, half shell cockles all face up around in a circle, with a drape of sauce on top, picked chervile and chicken skin.

name: Hazelnut Praline
text:
Recipe ID: 3 Cups Jerusalem Artichokes and Padron Pepper_Hazelnut pralne_3_parsed
Name: Hazelnut Praline

Ingredients:
- 60g Sugar Caster
- 50g Chinkiang vinegar
- 110g toasted Hazelnut
- 1 Salt
- 10g water
- 15g Soy
- 23g Hazelnut oil

Steps:
1. Put the sugar and Chinkiang vinegar in a pan and make a caramel with it.
2. When it's dark, add the toasted hazelnuts in and coat all the nuts with it, like making a praline.
3. Pour the content onto a tray lined with parchment paper and let it cool.
4. Blitz until smooth paste while adding the other ingredients to make it a bit more loose.
5. Reheat before service, you might need to add some water to make it a bit looser.

Other details:
total_time: 45min
total_batch_weight: 221g

Recipe ID: IMG_4745_parsed
Name: Creme anglaise

Ingredients:
- 4500 gr Lait
- 1500 gr Creme
- 1200 gr Jaunes d'oeufs
- 1200 gr Sucre
- 25 gr Stabilisateur
- 10 gr Gousse de vanille

Steps:
1. Mixer le tout au bamix
2. Pocher sous-vide 2kg par poche
3. Cuire sous-vide 83°C four vapeur pendant 1h30
4. Mixer au bamix
5. Refroidir et mettre sous vide

name: Pate a Choux
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_4765 2_parsed
Name: Pate a Choux

Ingredients:
- 500 gr lait
- 500 gr eau
- 20 gr trimoline
- 20 gr sel
- 600 gr farine
- 1400 gr oeufs

Steps:
1. Bouillir lait, eau, beurre, trimoline, sel.
2. Verser farine hors du feu.
3. Dessécher 3 min avant de commencer à ajouter les oeufs.
4. Après avoir incorporer les oeufs, la pâte doit être lisse et brillante.
5. Pocher sur plaque légèrement graissée.
6. Poser le craquelin si besoin.

Other details:
cuisson: 180-200°C
temps: 15-20 min
craquelin: {'beurre': '250 gr', 'farine': '310 gr', 'vergeoise': '310 gr', 'note': 'Pour cacao ajouter 50 gr de poudre de cacao'}

name: Black Sesame Paste
text:
Recipe ID: Black Sesame paste_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Black Sesame Paste

Ingredients:
- 750g Black Sesame seeds
- 120g Veg oil

Steps:
1. Toast sesame in a large surface pan.
2. Keep stirring, toast until the sesame skins are almost about to fall off.
3. Take off the heat source.
4. Blitz in thermomix til smooth in batches to ensure it's smooth and blitz properly.
5. Mix with oil in a container and store in fridge.

Other details:

name: Pain Pita
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_4824_parsed
Name: Pain Pita

Ingredients:
- 1440 Gr d'eau
- 180 Gr de sucre
- 130 Gr d'huile d'olive
- 300 Gr de levure fraîche
- 10 Gr de levure chimique
- 1920 Gr de farine
- 55 Gr de sel
- 5 Gr de poivre
- 5 Feuilles de thym
- 5 Gr d'origan

Steps:
1. Mettre dans un litre d'eau à 28 degrés, l'huile, sucre, levure, le thym, origan et mélanger.
2. Ajouter la farine, le sel, poivre et mélanger.
3. Laisser doubler de volume, couper en morceaux de 100g, faire des boules et stocker.
4. Laisser pousser une heure.
5. Faire une base, couper un morceau de 100g, étaler la pâte dessus et laisser pousser.
6. Cuire dans une plancha à 220°C, laisser gonfler et congeler.

Other details:
notes: Ne pas laisser plus d'une heure pousser. Ne pas laisser au frigo plus d'une heure.

name: Tea Duck
text:
Recipe ID: Tea Duck Brine_parsed
Name: Tea Duck

Ingredients:
- 10L Water
- 50g CapaciTea
- 50g Salt
- 30g Sugar
- 20g Dried Orange Peel
- 5g Sichuan Pepper
- 100g Maltose
- 20g Light Soy
- 200g House tea leaves from XU
- 20g Maldon Salt
- 30g Caster Sugar
- 2g Ground Green Sichuan

Steps:
1. Combine all brine ingredients together and whisk to dissolve salt and sugar.
2. If required immediately, take 500g of water, combine with salt, sugar, and tea, bring to a simmer to dissolve and brew tea, then add to the remainder of cold water for brining.
3. Brine duck for a minimum of 4 hours and a maximum of 12 hours.
4. Remove duck from brine and let skin dry.
5. Remove stems from tea leaves, fine chop, and combine with salt, sugar, and Sichuan pepper for tea salt.
6. Brush duck with maltose glaze, season with Maldon salt, Sichuan, and 'Fragrant' pepper.
7. Cook duck in oven skin side up at 180C to 48C, then let rest.

Other details:

name: Grissini stirati
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_5740_parsed
Name: Grissini stirati

Ingredients:
- farina 300W
- acqua di birra
- lievito di birra
- olio extra vergine d'oliva
- malto
- sale

Steps:
1. Impastare tutti gli ingredienti secondo i tempi d'impasto, preparare le tavole.
2. Spezzare la pasta formata in filoni, da kg 2,050 con la chiusura sotto.
3. Lasciare riposare 20 minuti, coperta con film senza asciugare, punto tagliare i filoni.
4. Stirare e tirare su padelle preferibilmente a rete.
5. Lasciare lievitare per 20-30M in cella di lievitazione.
6. Infornare alla temp. di 240°C con vapore e con taggi chiusi per 60M.

Other details:
Temp. finale: 25-26°C
Temp. imp. (spirale): 7M in 1° vel., 3M in 2° vel.
Note: (in radio x 15 min. 26 T. F.)

name: Yellow Chilli Marinade
text:
Recipe ID: yellow Chilli Marinade_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Yellow Chilli Marinade

Ingredients:
- 3000 gr Yellow Chilies (with seeds)
- 270 gr Garlic
- 1050 gr Lemon Juice
- 2400 gr Veg Oil
- 60 gr Lemon Zest
- 285 gr Lemon Grass
- 1800 gr Carrot
- 900 gr Tamarind Paste

Steps:
1. Blitz Chilies separately until very smooth consistency in thermo mix.
2. Blitz together the rest of ingredients until smooth consistency.
3. Add all together and blitz again.
4. Add oil slowly into the mix while thermo mix on 3 speed.
5. After full amount of oil inside the sauce, blitz on full speed for 5 more minutes.
6. After it's ready, cool down and keep refrigerated.

Other details:
total_time: 75min

name: Pork Cheek and Onion
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3803_parsed
Name: Pork Cheek and Onion

Ingredients:
- 1kg Pork cheek
- 1.5L Chicken stock
- 150g Smoked maple syrup
- 150g Red onion
- 50g Brown sugar
- 20g Water
- 2g Dry oregano

Steps:
1. Clean the cheeks well. Making sure to remove all the hair.
2. Salt for half an hour with grey salt.
3. Wash, dry and vac without anything.
4. Cook at 75 for 12 hours.
5. Strain and keep the juice.
6. Portion 100g slices then vac and store for service.
7. Reduce chicken stock and blend together.
8. Add ingredients and store.
9. Put in bottles and store in the water bath.
10. Thinly slice the onion.
11. Add the salt and massage until the onion becomes water.
12. Mix with the vinegar and the oregano.
13. Wait until the sugar dissolves.
14. Heat to cool then add to the onion.
15. Leave to rest in the fridge overnight.

Other details:
finishing_and_plating: ['Warm one portion of the pork in the water bath.', 'Torch the pork, both sides charred.', 'Cover with sauce and finish with 20g of onion on the side.']

name: Los tomates en aceite
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2083_parsed
Name: Los tomates en aceite

Ingredients:
- Aceite de oliva virgen extra
- 1 cabeza de ajos

Steps:
1. Mezclar la masa con un 25-30% de sal. Pasadas algunas horas se puede envasar al vacio en un bote de cristal. No se puede prensar, sino se incrementa la reventa.
2. El rendimiento de un 8% con respecto al peso de tomates inicial.
3. La pasta de tomate fermentado es muy salada y concentrada por lo que hay que usarla con moderacion.
4. Los tomates en aceite: Pelar la cabeza de ajos y aplastarlos con la mano. Sumergirlos y osmotizar los tomates con el aceite de ajos crudos.
5. Dejar los tomates en aceite durante 2 dias.
6. Pelar los tomates y cortarlos de manera natural en lonchas de unos 6 cm de espesor.
7. Escurrir los tomates del bano de aceite de ajos sobre un lito limpio.
8. Extender la pasta de tomate fermentado sobre un acetato o teflon.
9. Servir.

Other details:
notes: Mugaritz 2017

name: Turbot with Sea Herbs
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3783_parsed
Name: Turbot with Sea Herbs

Ingredients:
- For the brine
- Grey salt 150g
- Water 1 litre
- For the turbot
- 1 large turbot
- For the sauce
- Fish sauce
- Dashi
- Ginger
- Garlic
- Dried powder
- Kuzu
- For herbs
- Sea aster
- Sea purslane
- Sea beet
- Salty finger
- Samphire
- Finger lime

Steps:
1. Using a hand blender, dissolve the salt in the water.
2. Remove fillets from turbot, keeping the skin on.
3. Brine for 20-25 minutes.
4. Remove and rinse.
5. Leave for 2-3 days in the fridge.
6. Remove skin from fish.
7. Using non-stick pan, cook on a medium heat.
8. Do not induce any color.
9. Steam under vacuum at 47 degrees for 4 minutes.
10. Check temperature reaches 45 degrees.
11. Store above 65 degrees in either the oven or circulator.
12. Cut and portion all herbs.
13. Check total weight.

Other details:

name: Bombón de salmón, curado en casa
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_1499_parsed
Name: Bombón de salmón, curado en casa

Ingredients:
- La ventresca de salmón
- Isomalt
- Col fermentada

Steps:
1. Limpiar la ventresca de salmón, verificar que la ventresca no tenga espinas.
2. Cortar la ventresca en cubos de 5 cm.
3. Colocar los cubos de salmón en una bolsa de vacío.
4. Añadir unas pizcas de sales ahumadas.
5. Sellar al vacío.
6. Conservar en la nevera durante 12 horas.
7. Retirar las bolsas y escurrir el isomalt.
8. Secar bien con un paño de lino.
9. Reservar en cámara.
10. Servir el chucrut en bandejas de parrilla y ahumar con serrín durante 5 minutos.
11. Deshidratar el chucrut en horno a 80 grados durante 3 horas.
12. Triturar el chucrut hasta obtener un polvo fino.
13. Envasar al vacío en bolsa de 100 gramos.

Other details:
servings: 4 personas
cook_time: 12 hours for curing, 3 hours for dehydrating
temperature: 80 grados

name: Orange Butterscotch Sauce
text:
Recipe ID: Orange butterscotch sauce NEW_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Orange Butterscotch Sauce

Ingredients:
- 1500g Caster sugar
- 100g Butter
- pinch salt
- 2000g Orange juice
- 4500g whipping cream

Steps:
1. In a large pot caramelise the sugar until all liquid and golden brown
2. Add the salt then add the butter, until emulsified
3. Add the Orange juice and reduce completely
4. Add the whipping cream and bring back to simmer
5. Strain then blast chill with paper touching the top

Other details:
notes: ['Use cold pressed orange juice instead of juicing, use large pot', 'Don’t let cream boil over']

- 1 kg di mele pelate a spicchi
- 1 kg di zucchero
- 1 kg di glucosio
- 1 lt di acqua
- Scorza di 1 limone
- Cannella
- Chiodi di garofano
- Alloro
- Senape in grani o essenza di senape

Steps:
1. Far bollire l'acqua con tutti gli ingredienti 20 min.
2. Unire le mele e spegnere il fuoco.
3. Lasciare a mollo x 12 ore.
4. Far bollire il liquido x 10 min.
5. Mettere ancora le mele nel liquido e ripetere il procedimento 3/4 volte.
6. Far ridurre il liquido a piacere e aggiungere la senape o l'essenza di senape.

Other details:

Senape in grani o essenza di senape

name: Cendre des pres tibio: para todos
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2105_parsed
Name: Cendre des pres tibio: para todos

Ingredients:
- 750 g leche de almendra
- 250 ml agua
- 2 g sal
- 4.5 g agar
- 100 ml agua
- 100 g queso de almendra
- 0.8 g penicillium candidum

Steps:
1. La leche de almendras: En un mortero, triturar completamente la almendra marcona con el agua. Colar con superbag y reservar la leche.
2. El queso de almendra: Poner las almendras en una olla de presion con agua hasta cubrir. Cocer a 1 bar durante 10 minutos desde que sube la valvula.
3. En un cazo, disponer el agua, el polvo KA, la sal y el agar. Calentar a 90°C en Thermomix 60°C 1h y mantener caliente.
4. En un Thermomix, calentar la leche de almendra a 80°C velocidad 2. Anadir el gel caliente y mezclar bien a la misma temperatura hasta que todo se disuelva.
5. Verter la mezcla en moldes de 50 g y dejar enfriar a temperatura ambiente.
6. Una vez frio, desmoldar y cubrir con el queso de almendra.
7. Bajar a 30°C, agregar el penicillium candidum y mezclar bien.
8. Sobre un silpat, repartir la mezcla en una capa de 1 mm.
9. Servir inmediatamente o dejar secar hasta que se gelifique durante aprox. 1 hora a temperatura ambiente.
10. Retirar de los moldes.
11. Mezclar la cantidad sobrante con la comentada anteriormente en una proporcion 1:1 con agua. Con esta mezcla algo mas ligera, glasear los quesos.

Other details:
servings: 16 personas

name: Whipped Smoked Cod Roe
text:
Recipe ID: Whipped Smoked Cod Roe_Sheet1_0_parsed
Name: Whipped Smoked Cod Roe

Ingredients:
- 800g Veg Oil
- 400g Cod Roe
- 200g Lemon Juice

Steps:
1. Peel skin off Cod roe, Blend in thermo with lemon juice on speed 10 for 1 minute until smooth
2. Reduce speed to 1-2, pour the oil in a thin gentle stream to emulsify the oil into the cod roe
3. When all the oil is combined turn to speed up to 10 for 1 minute to ensure it's smooth
4. Season and pass through a chinois
5. Store in piping bags and use the small star nozzle for service

Other details:

name: Mushroom Crisps
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3767_parsed
Name: Mushroom Crisps

Ingredients:
- 500g large king oyster mushrooms
- 200g stock syrup

Steps:
1. Trim 1 cm off the length of the mushroom.
2. Using the meat slicer slice the mushrooms into slices with the sliced mushrooms syrup.
3. Place the slices on the silpat making sure they are not touching.
4. Dry at 55 degrees Celsius for 12 hours until crispy.
5. Store in airtight container with silica gel.
6. Remove mushroom crisps (the same size) from the container.
7. Place rectangle of ganache on top of the mushroom crisp.
8. Place another piece of the ganache, forming a sandwich.
9. Finish with a thick mushroom gel, mushroom gel on top the sandwich and finish with a third mushroom crisp.
10. Serve small plate with clean napkin.

Other details:

name: Burnt Seed Sauce
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3786_parsed
Name: Burnt Seed Sauce

Ingredients:
- 120g Dry Tomato
- 60g Flax seeds
- 60g Mustard seeds
- 48g Dry oregano
- 48g Honeybush tea
- 48g Fennel seeds
- 38g Milk powder
- 28g White pepper
- 48g Chamomile
- 38g Yellow Gilly seeds
- 38g Marigold flower dry
- 28g Tarragon
- 28g Lemon verbena
- 28g Marjoram
- 28g Sage
- 28g Tarragon
- 28g Lemon verbena
- 28g Marjoram
- 28g Sage
- 500g Water
- 40g Cod stock

Steps:
1. Toast all separately in the yakitori until blackened.
2. Simmer slowly with the water (2 hours).
3. Rinse the cod skins until clear.
4. Scrape the clean skins depending on the quality.
5. Use a large pan with cutlery on the base to prevent burning.
6. Simmer slowly for 4 hours.
7. Strain the cod stock and weigh the thickness.
8. Reduce in a clean pan chosen cutlery on the base.
9. Always check tartar sauce for bright golden color.
10. The desired texture is 40 Brix at the right golden color. This will be about 5 times reduced (approx).
11. Cook until desired texture.
12. Will make 3 jets (makes three).
13. Spin in the Paco jet 4 times from frozen.

Other details:

name: Garum de pepino de mar
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2086_parsed
Name: Garum de pepino de mar

Ingredients:
- 1 pepino de mar
- 250 g de sal marina
- 30 g de jengibre
- 4 cucharadas de pimiento Ezpelette

Steps:
1. Triturar los ingredientes menos el pepino de mar con una batidora.
2. Triturar el pepino de mar con los ingredientes hasta obtener una pasta.
3. Dejar fermentar en un bote cristal durante 1 mes o hasta la descomposicion de las proteinas del pepino de mar.
4. Pasado el tiempo, colar y anadir los solidos restantes.
5. Congelar el liquido obtenido y dejar sobre un lieno.
6. Reservar el liquido clarificado.

Other details:
servings: Para 4 personas
author: Mugaritz 2017

name: Armagnac de Liebre
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_2119_parsed
Name: Armagnac de Liebre

Ingredients:
- 5 ud. liebres o conejos sin visceras
- 1.5 l. Vino tinto
- 250 g. Oporto
- 200 g. Salsa de Soja
- 200 g. Manzanilla
- 150 g. Apio
- 150 g. Zanahoria
- 200 g. Cebolla
- 5 g. Tomillo
- 25 g. Pimienta negra
- 500 g. Sangre de cerdo
- 60 g. Bas Armagnac

Steps:
1. Picar la verdura en trozos regulares.
2. Trocear la liebre en porciones pequeñas y regulares.
3. Colocar las liebres, la verdura, la pimienta y el tomillo en una olla alta. Mojar con los vinos y la soja (no el Armagnac).
4. Marinar en refrigeracion durante 1 noche.
5. Separar la carne de liebre de la marinada.
6. Separar las verduras de la marinada.
7. Colar el liquido de la marinada para retirar las pimientas.
8. En una sarten muy caliente o en basculante, dorar la carne de las liebres hasta que adquiera una costra marron. Desglasar la sarten con un poco de agua, para desprender la proteina que se adhiere al fondo de la cazuela.
9. En una sarten caliente, dorar la verdura hasta caramelizarla completamente.
10. Cuando la carne de liebre este bien caramelizada, unificarlas y mojar con la marinada.
11. Llevar a un hervor suave y cocer durante 20 minutos, agregar la sangre de cerdo y cocer unos 20 minutos mas.
12. Colar el caldo usando un chino. No tirar NADA!
13. En una olla, colocar los restos colados del caldo anterior y volver a mojar con: 1.5 l. Vino tinto, 250 g. Oporto, 250 g. Manzanilla, 150 g. Salsa de Soja, 4 l. Agua.
14. Llevar a un fuego y cocer durante 40 minutos en un hervor suave.
15. Colar usando un chino. Descartar los restos colados y llevar el liquido a la fase de filtrado.

Other details:

name: Bread
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_3806_parsed
Name: Bread

Ingredients:
- For the malt water
- 120g Malt
- 41g Water
- For the dough
- Malt water (above recipe)
- 750g White spelt
- 750g Whole spelt
- 110g Salt
- 3.2g Fresh yeast
- 1.2kg Natural dough starter
- 60g Custom (baked precious hemp) seeds

Steps:
1. Mix the two and leave in fridge overnight.
2. Mix all the ingredients minus the salt and the yeast for 6 minutes.
3. Add the yeast and salt and leave to rest in the fridge overnight.
4. The next day, prep for one hour then portion and prove for 2 hours.
5. Cook at 250°C.

Other details:

name: Prawn Marinade
text:
Recipe ID: 16 Spice Prawn_parsed
Name: Prawn Marinade

Ingredients:
- 200 g Garlic
- 200g Ginger
- 700g Kimlan (fermented glutinous rice)
- 40 g Baking powder
- 350g Superior Light Soy
- 200g Sugar
- 100g Sichuan Oil
- 200g Katakuriko
- 5g Baking Soda
- 5 g Baking Powder
- 20g 16 Spice Mix
- 5 g Salt

Steps:
1. Blitz in thermomix all together until smooth.
2. For every 500g measure of prawn use 200g measure of marinade.
3. Mix all ingredients together for Prawn Dredge.
4. Marinade prawns in marinade.
5. Pane in Prawn Dredge, Egg Liquid, Prawn Dredge.
6. Fry prawn 1 minute at 180C in Fryer.
7. Dust with 16 Spice, serve with lime wedge on bed of chilis.

Other details:

raw.name: Prawn Marinade
steps: Blitz in thermomix all together until smooth.
For every 500g measure of prawn use 200g measure of marinade.
Mix all ingredients together for Prawn Dredge.
Marinade prawns in marinade.
Pane in Prawn Dredge, Egg Liquid, Prawn Dredge.
Fry prawn 1 minute at 180C in Fryer.
Dust with 16 Spice, serve with lime wedge on bed of chilis.

name: Sorbet Citron
text:
Recipe ID: IMG_4775 2_parsed
Name: Sorbet Citron

Ingredients:
- 1000 gr Puree citron
- 1000 gr Eau
- 621 gr Sucre
- 260 gr Dextrose
- 6 gr Stabilisateur

Steps:
1. Dans l'eau tiede ajouter sous agitation les elements secs melanges ensemble.
2. Pasteuriser a 85°C.
3. Refroidir rapidement a 4°C.
4. Mixer la puree.
5. Couler 700 gr par paco.

Other details:
note: Pour 5 paco

name: Crab Oil
text:
Recipe ID: Crab Oil_parsed
Name: Crab Oil

Ingredients:
- 500g Dried Red Chilli Powder
- 500g Korean Chili Powder
- 2500g Rapeseed Oil

Steps:
1. Roast chillies.
2. In a pot add all ingredients together and bring up to smoking point heat.
3. Remove from heat and let infuse overnight.
4. Strain and vac pack

id: 3 Cups Jerusalem Artichokes and Padron Pepper_3 cups dressing_2_parsed
name: 3 Cups Dressing
text:
Recipe ID: 3 Cups Jerusalem Artichokes and Padron Pepper_3 cups dressing_2_parsed
Name: 3 Cups Dressing

Ingredients:
- 89g Soy
- 20g Rice Wine
- 20g Taiwanese Vinegar
- 15g Ginger
- 5g Sugar
- 20g Water
- 17g Garlic finely diced
- 11g Lemon Juice
- 40g Hazelnut oil

Steps:
1. Bring all the ingredients (above pink line) to nearly boiled, so that the sugar melts, remove from heat.
2. Pass the hot sauce, and pour it on top of the garlic so it removes a bit of its pungency.
3. Add the fresh lemon juice and Hazelnut oil at the end, to finish your dressing, this should be added freshly every day.

Other details:
total_time: 45min
total_batch_weight: 169g

raw.name: 3 Cups Dressing
steps: Bring all the ingredients (above pink line) to nearly boiled, so that the sugar melts, remove from heat.
Pass the hot sauce, and pour it on top of the garlic so it removes a bit of its pungency.
Add the fresh lemon juice and Hazelnut oil at the end, to finish your dressing, this should be added freshly every day.

text:
Recipe ID: _Cockles with Fermented Chili Dressing_Fermented Chili Dressing_1_parsed
Name: Fermented Chili Dressing Cockle

- 28 g Green Chili
